response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ expertise in industrial or embedded contexts, with no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or IoT protocols required for the role; most recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, and C++ experience is limited to a 6-month role over a decade ago.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse technologies and domains
Strong track record in open-source contributions and technical education
Proven ability to deliver complex systems in distributed and real-time environments
concerns: No recent or substantial C++/STL work in the last 9+ years
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or automation protocols
Primary tech stack is web-focused (TypeScript/Node.js), not embedded/cloud industrial systems
